letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice crestline-202602

To the Billing Department, Crestline Office Supplies:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice crestline-202602, covering the
billing period 2026-02-01 through 2026-02-28.

Per the governing clause (MSA §4.2):

    "Each supply kit ordered shall be billed at $12.00 per kit."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $1,330.00.
The invoice as billed totals $1,738.00, a discrepancy of $408.00.

Calculation:
  - supply_kit usage: expected 1080.00, billed 1488.00 (overcharge of 408.00)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $408.00 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Each supply kit ordered shall be billed at $12.00 per kit.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 408.00.
